strategies.name: Outside to secret
strategies.description: Use wall smokes and cross to secret.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: outside smoke wall cross to secret

meta.purpose: Gain lower pressure without first fighting upper
goodWhen: your team can throw wall cleanly

strategies.name: Fast ramp
strategies.description: Hit ramp quickly with flash support.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Beat ramp setup and open lower split options

strategies.name: Hut squeaky A
strategies.description: Pressure upper A through hut and squeaky.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: hut + squeaky go A flash door

meta.purpose: Overwhelm site from two entry points

strategies.name: Fake hut to ramp
strategies.description: Make noise upper then pivot into ramp.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Pull upper rotation and open lower path

strategies.name: Outside control
strategies.description: Take outside with wall and garage pressure.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Own yard space and keep multiple follow-up options

strategies.name: Upper A execute
strategies.description: Commit to upper with core site smokes.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Cut heaven and vision lines while taking upper

strategies.name: Vent drop B
strategies.description: Drop vent and pressure lower with decon smoke.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Arrive lower quickly and reduce decon swing risk

strategies.name: Lobby control
strategies.description: Use lobby pressure to open upper options.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Take space safely before choosing upper or vent route

strategies.name: Delayed lower split
strategies.description: Wait in lobby and hit lower after one minute.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: hide lobby till 1:00 then ramp + secret split B smoke decon

meta.purpose: Punish early CT lobby aggression and lower rotations

strategies.name: Garage to secret
strategies.description: Pressure garage to support an outside lower route.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: 2 garage 3 outside smoke wall go secret

meta.purpose: Force yard defenders to split attention
notes: garage player should call heaven rotate

strategies.name: Squeaky late A
strategies.description: Hold squeaky pressure and burst A later.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: hold squeaky till 1:00 then hut + door go A smoke heaven

meta.purpose: Punish CTs that rotate off upper too early
notes: works best with one hut lurk

strategies.name: Ramp to upper
strategies.description: Show ramp and come back upper through hut.
strategies.creator: System
strategies.message: show ramp 2 then 5 hut + squeaky go A flash door

meta.purpose: Move rotation down before snapping back upper
goodWhen: you need a fake without outside

strategies.name: Outside control
strategies.description: Contest yard early.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Deny easy wall smokes and secret access
notes: do not overpeek after first info

strategies.name: Ramp aggression
strategies.description: Fight ramp for space and info.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Prevent free lower pressure and learn lobby spread

strategies.name: Upper crossfire
strategies.description: Two-player A site crossfire.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Stabilize upper against hut and door pressure
notes: rafters and site roles should be clear

strategies.name: Stack lower
strategies.description: Gamble heavier lower presence.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Shut down secret and ramp-to-B rounds

strategies.name: Lobby push
strategies.description: Push lobby for early information.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Catch passive defaults and disrupt hut/squeaky setup

strategies.name: Heaven rotate setup
strategies.description: Play upper with faster heaven support rotation.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Support upper or outside from a central rotate position
goodWhen: enemy mixes upper and yard pressure
notes: do not get isolated by smoke

strategies.name: Yard push flash
strategies.description: Use flash support to take aggressive yard space.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Punish outside wall setups before they form

strategies.name: Lower retake
strategies.description: Delay lower and retake together.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Avoid isolated lower deaths against split pressure
notes: call vent and secret timing early

strategies.name: Double ramp
strategies.description: Two defenders dedicated to ramp.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Stop free ramp access and punish simple lower setups
goodWhen: you can spare less upper presence

strategies.name: Garage support yard
strategies.description: Use garage to support outside control.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Create layered vision on wall-cross attempts

strategies.name: Anti-hut rush
strategies.description: Prepare to stop fast upper hut hits.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Delay quick A floods until rotates can help
goodWhen: you have strong upper anchor duo

strategies.name: Save compact
strategies.description: Compact hold for fragile economy.
strategies.creator: System

meta.purpose: Reduce opening picks and preserve rifles
notes: avoid solo ramp and yard peeks
